user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new support team, so that employees have designated contacts for each location and module
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Support Team screen; When I click Add new support team and provide locations, modules, contact type and contacts; Then the support team is saved and listed

user_story: As an employee, I want to see the primary and secondary contacts for my location and module, so that I know whom to reach for support
acceptance_criteria: Given support teams exist; When I view the list; Then each row shows Location(s), Module(s), Contact type, Primary contact and Secondary contact

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to associate a support team with multiple locations and modules, so that one team can cover several sites and functions
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding a support team; When I select multiple locations and modules and save; Then the team is mapped to all selected locations and modules
